title: Ancient Angkor
author: Michael A. Freeman
description: Grouping the temples into easy-to-visit itineraries, and with useful hotel and travel information, Ancient Angkor will serve both as a history of the temples in its own right and an invaluable companion guide. Book is in fair to good condition with mild to moderate general wear and tear, creasing to the front cover, light water damage to front and rear couple of pages that has caused some ink to run, staining to the back page from ink, cover has started to come away from the internal spine, pen inscription on the inside front page. This book has been well used on a trip to the region it covers and would be suitable as a reference book only, not as a collectible. Attached picture is of actual book.
